text:
Once upon a time, there was a small town. In the town lived a gentle giant named Ivan. Ivan loved owls. Every rainy afternoon, Ivan would watch majestic owls perched atop tall trees.

One day, Ivan heard murmurs that some owls had vanished mysteriously. Worried, Ivan embarked on an owl-seeking adventure. After hours of wandering through woods, he came across an elderly owl clutching a feather.

"You've lost yours," Ivan spoke gently.

The owl faltered. "Yes... It's Owlfred."

For weeks, Ivan loved OwllfRED. They spent evenings exchanging lore.

Then OwllfRED told Ivan of a great glacial cave.

"The owls huddle there."

Ivan felt thrilled.

Late autumn came. Ivan traveled deep into the pine forest. They reached the cave entrance.

"The owls sleep here."

They crept inside. As night settled, OwllfRED fluttered gently. Ivan felt its warmth.

They rested. Owllf
